import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    let val = match sorted.get(i)
      when Some(v) v
      when None 0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= val
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, val)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < nums.len()
    let val = match nums.get(i)
      when Some(v) v
      when None 0
    end
    if not list.contains(result, val)
      result = insert_sorted(result, val)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn join_ints(_ nums: List<Int>) -> String
  mut s = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < nums.len()
    let val = match nums.get(i)
      when Some(v) v
      when None 0
    end
    if i == 0
      s = "#{val}"
    else
      s = "#{s} #{val}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  s
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut parsed: List<Int> = []
mut idx = 0
while idx < tokens.len()
  let token = match tokens.get(idx)
    when Some(t) t
    when None ""
  end
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(n)
    parsed = list.push(parsed, n)
  when None
    ()
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
let sorted = sort_unique(parsed)
println(join_ints(sorted))
